title: Locum Home Care Nurse ( Freelance )
description:
Job Description & Requirements

  • Flexible Working Hours
  • Island-Wide

SALO is a homecare services provider seeking nurses interested in homecare and flexible working hours.

Job Scope:

Home Nursing Care Plan:

  • Assess general health condition of clients and document in care plan.
  • Evaluate social history, including financial constraints; make referrals/recommendations.
  • Assess home environment; provide necessary referrals/recommendations.
  • Advise clients/caregivers on care plans for continuity of care.
  • Anticipate and resolve issues; refer to supervisor when needed.
  • Document visit observations, procedures, and action plans within one workday post-visit.
  • Import and upload wound images and vital signs as needed.

Nursing Procedures:

  • Wound dressing and management.
  • Change and manage indwelling urinary catheters (IDC).
  • Change and manage nasogastric feeding tubes (NGT).
  • Manage stomas and their appliances.
  • Medication packing and reconciliation.
  • Flush PICC lines and change site dressings.
  • Provide oral and tracheostomy care and suctioning.
  • Conduct customized caregiver training.

Job Requirements:

  • Registered with Singapore Nursing Board with valid certification.
  • Minimum 3 years of nursing experience in a medical or geriatric ward/community setting
  • Experience in oncology or palliative care is an advantage.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills; comfortable with diverse individuals.
  • Positive attitude towards learning and feedback.
  • Adaptable and collaborative team player.
  • Independent and reliable; performs well in all aspects of work.
  • Ability to make sound clinical judgments in homecare settings.
  • Keen interest in supporting end-of-life care for homebound seniors.

Interested applicants, kindly furnish us with your detailed resume and email to recruitment@salo.sa or WA 88681573

** We regret to inform only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Applicants who do not possess necessary experience or qualification will still be considered on individual merits and may be contacted for other opportunities. **

SALOHealth Management

EA Licence No.: 24C2535

postedCompany.description:
SALO is a nurse-led agency committed to delivering exceptional healthcare solutions across Singapore. Founded and operated by experienced nurses, we specialize in two core areas: full-time nurse recruitment for healthcare institutions and personalized homecare nursing services.

With our deep understanding of both the healthcare industry and the unique needs of patients at home, SALO is your trusted partner in providing top-tier nursing services for both healthcare facilities and private households.
postedCompany.name: SALOHEALTH MANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.
